Class List

Here are the classes, structs, unions and interfaces with brief descriptions:
ESOptimizeContextClass designed to encapsulate all the information needed by the GSL optimization function
ExtremalSurfaceThis class represents Extremal Surfaces
MLSSurfaceThis class represents Moving Least Squares Surfaces
Vector33D Vector representation. It is an old version of the Vector class defined in the Galileo project. http://www.cs.utah.edu/~boulos/galileo/
